title: tragopyrum polygamum
intro: Tragopyrum polygamum, also known as the two-flowered fumitory, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Papaveraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragopyrum polygamum include the potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Tragopyrum polygamum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine as a tincture or dried powder.
